verses.text: Tua ciangin Job in dawng a
“Tua bang thute ka zaza khin a, no' hehnepna pen gimna ding bek ahi hi
Khawl hun neiloin gengen lai ding na hi uh hiam? Na gen ding uh omom lai ahi hiam
Note leh keimah a kikhek thei hi lehang, note' gen khempeuh kei zong ka gen thei ding hi. Note ka lu hong peisanin thu tampi tak mah ka hong gen thei ding hi
Ahi zongin keimah in note hong tua cihloin, thuhoih mahmah tawh note hong hehnemin, note hehnepna ding thu ka gen ding hi
Thu gengen ta leng ka natna nuamtuamlo a, pau kei ta leng zong, phatuam tuanlo hi
Pasian aw, kei nong paatsak ngiingei a, ka innkuan khempeuh na sisakmang khin hi
Kei na hong mancip a, keima gal na suak hi. Ka vun guak leh ka guh guak bekin ka om a, keima mawhna a kilatna-in mite in a ngaihsun uh hi
“Pasian in a hehna tawh hong balnen ngiingei a, a ha hong gawisanin hong heh et hi
Mite in kei hong zahko uh a, ka paang a beng dingin hong kikhawmtuah uh hi
Pasian in migilote' khutsungah kei hong pia hi
Kei nuamtakin a om kimlai, Pasian in ka gawlin hong manin, hong balgawpin hong sugawp hi. Pasian in a muitum dingin kei hong suang a
ka kimkot panin a thaltangte tawh hong kap hi. Tua thaltangte in kei hong kha-in hong liamsak a, tua bang nangawnah kei hong hehpihlo hi
Amah in hong hehpih hetloin kei hong liamsak thuahthuah a, galkap a hehpa bangin kei hong hihgawp hi
“Kei thumin puanhampi ka silh a, guallelin leivui lakah ka om hi
Ka kahkahna-in ka mai khempeuh san gawp a, ka mitkhute bawkgawpin khua ka mu thei kei hi
Ahi zongin ngongtatna themkhat zong ka zang kei a, Pasian tungah ka thungetna pen lungsim takpi tawh ahi hi
“Leitung aw, a manloin kei hong kibawlna seelcip kei in! Thuman deihin ka kikona ka awging daicipsak kei in
Kei-a' dingin a ding ding, a hong pan'pih ding mi khat vantungah om hi
Pasian in ka khitui luan'na hong mu-in ka thungetna hong za leh ka ut hi
Mi khat in a lawmpa-a' ding a thumsak mah bangin mi khatpeuh in Pasian' kiangah kei-a' dingin hong thuumsak leh ka ut hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hun nai mahmah ta a, ka lehzuih nawnloh ding lampi zui-in a pai ka hita hi.
